g.text: A maxed-out preclinical scorecard did not stop these drugs failing

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5b544e

g.text: Six drugs with strong mechanistic / cell / animal / PD evidence that failed in humans. Genetics (added here from Melissa Du's genetic_only_v1) is the one column that varies — and even the well-supported ones failed.

text.style: font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue'; text-anchor: start; fill: #938b82

g.text: Preclinical scores from CASE_STUDIES.md; genetics from her DB (target-level). *CETP: genetics weak AND misleading — Mendelian randomization later showed HDL is not causal.
